data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of notifying clients about new provider details. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms this notification occurs within the saga lifecycle. The linked use case mentions the need for client notifications, but the absence of any concrete evidence or API interactions that demonstrate this functionality leads to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of client notification with new provider details.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify client notification functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the API sends notifications to clients when a new provider is assigned.
